name: 100 Find Kitties: Kitty house
developer: FM Simple Games Studio, Sons of Welder
publisher: FM Simple Games Studio, Sons of Welder
short_description: 100 Find Kitties: Kitty house is a hidden objects/hidden creatures game. The player's task is to find all hundred cats on the map.
detailed_description:
Oh my! Playful cats have taken over this house. Help the owner find all the kittens before they make a terrible mess. Let's do it!

100 Find Kitties: Kitty house is a hidden objects/hidden creatures game. The player's task is to find all hundred hidden cats on the map.

The game is decorated with atmospheric and hand-drawn graphics, the kittens are cozy and cute.

100 kittens to find

hand-drawn graphics

progress record
